issues.detail: Does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path.
Assumes Node.js environment, minor platform assumption.

scenarios.name: Full .releaserc.json with changelog + git plugins
scenarios.rationale: Treatment installs semantic-release + @semantic-release/changelog + @semantic-release/git and wires the full plugin chain (commit-analyzer, release-notes-generator, changelog, npm, git with assets, github) on main; baseline uses the legacy CLI wizard and omits the explicit plugin list and assets.

scenarios.name: CI wiring with GITHUB_TOKEN and NPM_TOKEN
scenarios.rationale: Both cover CI on main with both tokens; treatment additionally spells out the feat→minor / fix→patch / BREAKING CHANGE→major conventional-commits mapping the skill teaches.
